title: Stop Prompting. Start Looping (The New AI Way)
summary: Loop engineering replaces manual prompt iteration by defining success criteria, letting an agent act, and using a judge model to verify results and repeat until the goal is met. The approach includes several implementations: Fusion loops with configurable rounds, agent Kanban boards with planner/builder/reviewer roles, Fusion boardroom combining multiple outputs, and Sakana Fugu council approaches.
writeup: The video introduces loop engineering as an alternative to manual prompt iteration: success criteria are defined up front, an agent acts, and a judge model verifies results and repeats until the goal is met. It walks through several implementations, including Fusion loops with configurable rounds, agent Kanban boards that split work across planner, builder, and reviewer roles, a Fusion boardroom that combines multiple outputs, and Sakana Fugu council approaches. The framing rests on a doer-judge structure and test-time compute, where repeated passes and verification replace single-shot prompting.
